tools.name: LookupSearchSuggestions
tools.description: Look up performers, venues, or events by name. Returns matching IDs that can be used with SearchEvents for precise results. Use this when customer mentions a specific performer, team, or venue name that you want to search precisely.

tools.name: LookupLocation
tools.description: Validate and resolve a location string to coordinates + radius for proximity search. Returns lat/lng and radius in miles. If location is too broad (e.g., just a state), asks for clarification with a more specific location.

tools.name: LookupCategory
tools.description: Look up event categories by name or keyword. Returns categoryId and subCategoryId for use with SearchEvents. Returns ALL matching categories/subcategories when multiple matches exist. Use this when customer asks for generic event types like 'comedy shows', 'baseball games', 'rock concerts', etc.

tools.name: LookupEvent
tools.description: Look up events to get eventIds for use with BrowseTicketsForEvent. Returns event data WITHOUT displaying a carousel. Use this when customer asks for tickets on a specific date - find the event first, then call BrowseTicketsForEvent with the eventId.

tools.name: LookupSearchSuggestions
tools.description: Look up performers, venues, or events by name. Returns matching IDs that can be used with SearchEvents for precise results. Use this when customer mentions a specific performer, team, or venue name that you want to search precisely.

tools.name: LookupLocation
tools.description: Validate and resolve a location string to coordinates + radius for proximity search. Returns lat/lng and radius in miles. If location is too broad (e.g., just a state), asks for clarification with a more specific location.

tools.name: LookupEvent
tools.description: Look up events to get eventIds for use with BrowseTicketsForEvent. Returns event data WITHOUT displaying a carousel. Use this when customer asks for tickets on a specific date - find the event first, then call BrowseTicketsForEvent with the eventId.

tools.name: SearchEvents
tools.description: Search for live events. Use pre-resolved IDs from LookupSearchSuggestions (performerId/venueId) and coordinates from LookupLocation (lat/lng/radius) for precise results. Returns event carousel with images and pricing.

tools.name: BrowseTicketsForEvent
tools.description: Get available ticket listings for a specific event. REQUIRES eventId - use SearchEvents first to find the event, then pass the eventId here. Returns comprehensive ticket information including seats, pricing, delivery methods, seat views, and checkout links. Use the 'section' param for natural section filtering (e.g., 'club box', 'lower level') - it does partial matching automatically. Use sectionIds or sectionNames only when you have exact values from availableSections metadata.

tools.description: Get available ticket listings for a specific event. REQUIRES eventId - use SearchEvents first to find the event, then pass the eventId here. Returns comprehensive ticket information including seats, pricing, delivery methods, seat views, and checkout links. Use the 'section' param for natural section filtering (e.g., 'club box', 'lower level') - it does partial matching automatically. Use sectionIds or sectionNames only when you have exact values from availableSections metadata.
